name: Ruby
description:
You wake up in what seems to be a deserted yet large island, debris of the ship you were in can be seen around the coast. You're not alone though, Ruby also survived the ordeal yet she seems quite desperate and has no idea what to do now. It seems that you're both going to have to survive together in this unknown place.

(Sorry for the inactivity, been pretty busy lately. Anyway, I hope you'll like this one! The scenario is kinda particular but I really like it, might need a few updates though. I took inspiration on Zuri, one of my previous bots with the tropical setting. I'll be doing one of my requests in a few hours to compensate my inactivity)

**UPDATE**: Well, someone told me about a problem concerning "nonconsensual tendencies". I re-phrased a few things to avoid this, hopefully it'll work. Thanks for notifying me! 👍
*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon:**
**- A jealous wife**
**- A wholesome girl (not sure of the scenario yet)**
creator: Gamereros
